MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jun-12-2008 Off Calendar

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-12-2008 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances on Thursday, June 12, 2008: David Gerard Mendez, attorney for plaintiff Balwant D. Thakor, who is also present; Naoki S. Kaneko, limited scope attorney for defendant Michael Phillip Bennett, who is also present

Settlement conference held. Parties enter into a signed agreement, which is filed with the Court. See scanned document for settlement terms contained in the signed agreement for premises located at 481 Minna Street, #317, San Francisco, CA 94103. June 16, 2008 trial date is vacated.

Judge Pro Tem Guy Stilson, Clerk L. Fong, not reported (218)

Notice Of Motion Dto Quash Service Of Summons
Off Calendar Apr-29-2008 Denied
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
DEFENDANT MICHAEL BENNETT'S Motion TO Quash Service Of Summons IS DENIED FOR INSUFFICIENT SERVICE. NO OPPOSITION FILED. Prevailing party is to prepare a form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR# 8189 =301/PJB
